gig_title: I will generate your legal contract or proposal
description:
🔧 I will generate your legal contract or proposal

I deliver a tailored, legally-structured doc from a simple intake form using DocAssemble + Hermes drafting + your doc-extractor skill.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• $50–$300/doc, $5 AI cost
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($30, 3 days, 1 rev): Setup only, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($120, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 workflows, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($240, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited workflows, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goal (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 31-skill autonomous company.
